summary: A brief personal update from DHH as a university student in 2001, noting he's heading out for a five-day wilderness trip as part of his university introduction week. He hopes the trip involves more than just heavy drinking. He mentions bringing his Palm Pilot and keyboard to capture any thoughts while offline. This is a snapshot of early-blog-era personal updates, long before DHH became known for Rails or tech commentary.
key_points: DHH was a university student documenting his daily life on an early blog
He carried a Palm Pilot and portable keyboard to write on the go, showing early dedication to writing and technology
The post reflects the casual, diary-like nature of early 2000s blogging
money_quotes: I am taking my Palm Pilot and a small keyboard in case I need to type any loud thoughts. None will be lost.
key_insight: Even as a university student in 2001, DHH was committed to capturing and publishing his thoughts, foreshadowing his prolific career as a writer and public thinker.
